name: fix-critical-websocket-bugs
description: Fix critical bugs in ws.py: (1) str(bytes) sends literal b... breaking JSON.parse on frontend — must decode bytes to utf-8 string, (2) synchronous storage.exists() blocks event loop — wrap with asyncio.to_thread, (3) no ping/pong keepalive — dead connections persist forever, (4) pubsub.aclose() may not exist in redis-py <5.0 — add compatibility check.
instruction:
Fix 4 bugs in forge-api/app/routers/ws.py:
1. Line 65: Replace await websocket.send_text(str(data)) with bytes decode: if isinstance(data, bytes): data = data.decode(utf-8); await websocket.send_text(data)
2. Line 48: Replace exists = storage.exists(slug, tracker) with exists = await asyncio.to_thread(storage.exists, slug, tracker)
3. Add periodic ping in the polling loop (every 30s): send {event: ping} to detect dead connections
4. Line 75: Wrap pubsub.aclose() with hasattr check for redis-py version compatibility
acceptance_criteria: WebSocket messages decoded from bytes to utf-8 before sending
pubsub cleanup works with both redis-py 4.x and 5.x
